_reviewOnly: This manifest is a review/evidence artifact only. It is NOT the production manifest for tile_farm_path_dirt (only the center variant exists here; edge_*, corner_*, and inner_corner_* variants do not exist yet) and its output is NOT a runtime asset. Do not load target.outputPath in Phaser or reference it from a production manifest.
_sourceNote: The approved runtime master is a 16x16 PNG that already passed ChatGPT's visual audit (docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_farm_path_dirt_center/dirt_center.approved-master-16x16.png, identical to the originally attached dirt_center_candidate3_16x16.png). The original AI-generated high-resolution image was deliberately NOT used as the production source because it still carried high-resolution plus/cross-like motifs that violate the production art spec, even though they disappear after normalization. assets/source/generated/tile_farm_path_dirt/center.png is instead a canonical high-resolution source produced by exact 64x nearest-neighbour block-replication of the approved 16x16 master (scripts/upscale-nearest-neighbor.mjs) so the pipeline has a normal high-resolution source input; it introduces no new pixel information beyond the approved master.
